query:
-- 1. Add blog_post to jobs.profile enum
ALTER TABLE `jobs` MODIFY COLUMN `profile` enum('aa_company','david_personal','blog_post') NOT NULL;

-- 2. Add blog-specific columns to jobs
ALTER TABLE `jobs`
  ADD COLUMN `blogKeyword` varchar(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `blogTone` enum('educational','thought_leadership','story_driven') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `blogWordCount` enum('short','standard','long') NULL;

-- 3. Create style_guides table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `style_guides` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `profile` enum('aa_company','david_personal','blog_post') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `style_guides_profile_unique` (`profile`)
);

-- 4. Create guardrail_config table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `guardrail_config` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `competitorNames` text NULL,
  `bannedPhrases` text NULL,
  `flaggedClaimTypes` text NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 5. Create posting_rhythm table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `posting_rhythm` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `profile` enum('aa_company','david_personal','blog_post') NOT NULL,
  `targetPerWeek` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `posting_rhythm_profile_unique` (`profile`)
);

-- 6. Add linkedInUrl and publicationStatus to posts (if missing)
ALTER TABLE `posts`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `linkedInUrl` text NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `publicationStatus` enum('pending','confirmed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';

-- 7. Create idea_batches table (if missing)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `idea_batches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `submittedById` int NOT NULL,
  `profile` enum('aa_company','david_personal','blog_post') NOT NULL,
  `contentPillar` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `brief` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 8. Create ideas table (if missing)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ideas` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `batchId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` text NOT NULL,
  `rationale` text NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','queued','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `jobId` int NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
